input.objective: Restore Outcome.output_taint through checkpoint deserialize so settled-effect recovery after max_steps keeps authentic result digests. Accept bare taint levels and full %Taint{} via a closed parser, keep transient taint_reductions empty, and repair resume fixtures without clearing authoritative effect evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Checkpoint.deserialize restores output_taint for bare levels and full Taint structs so effect result digests match settled receipts.
Transient taint_reductions remain empty after rehydrate.
Resume fixtures and engine tests cover result_digest_mismatch regression without clearing current_effect evidence.

input.objective: Harden checkpoint taint decoding so malformed or unexpected taint payloads fail closed while valid bare levels and structured Taint values continue to round-trip.
acceptance_criteria: Checkpoint taint decoding rejects invalid shapes without raising unstructured errors that corrupt recovery.
Valid bare levels and structured Taint payloads still rehydrate for effect digests.
Focused checkpoint tests cover the hardened decoder paths.

input.objective: Cover workspace release descriptor bounds in the coding benchmark adapter path so unknown workspace_release_status values and non-ISO workspace_expires_at timestamps are rejected.
acceptance_criteria: Adapter artifact validation rejects workspace_release with an unknown status such as pending.
Adapter artifact validation rejects workspace_release with a non-ISO workspace_expires_at value.
Existing valid workspace_release descriptor cases continue to pass.
